extract: Drain Punch (Japanese: ドレインパンチ Drain Punch) is a damage-dealing Fighting-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TM60 in Generation IV and Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM63 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM073 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM131 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
